The current assets are reported at £1.0B, while the sales revenue stands at £4.0B, and the cost of goods sold is noted as £3,456.
Furthermore, the analysis indicates that the turnover rate is 2.5%, reflecting the efficiency of the inventory management
practices in relation to the overall sales performance. Specifically, the inventory days metric of 30 days aligns with a turnover
